name: MEXC现货交易所
description: 全球第三大Spot CEX，2025年增长最快的主流CEX之一，全年Spot Volume YoY增长+90.9%，达到$1.5T。已做到全球第三大Spot CEX（9.1%市占率）。总部位于新加坡，服务全球170+个国家和地区，拥有超过4000万用户。
descriptionEn: The world's third-largest Spot CEX, one of the fastest-growing mainstream CEXs in 2025, with Spot Volume YoY growth of +90.9% to $1.5T. Ranking third globally in Spot CEX (9.1% market share). Headquartered in Singapore, serving 170+ countries and regions with over 40 million users.

name: Maxinsights
description: 高速成长的种子轮具身智能初创公司，致力于构建下一代机器人智能基础设施。End-to-End Data Solutions For Embodied AI，做数据为主，针对机器人/具身智能行业，数据是从真实生活中获取手部数据、人体数据，给大模型使用。在北京、苏州和Santa Clara都有Office，目前全职员工超过100人。
descriptionEn: A fast-growing seed-stage embodied AI startup committed to building the next generation of robotics intelligent infrastructure. End-to-End Data Solutions For Embodied AI, focusing on data solutions for robotics/embodied AI industry. Data is collected from real-life scenarios including hand data and human body data for LLM training. Offices in Beijing, Suzhou, and Santa Clara, with over 100 full-time employees.
